title.description: Heading on the 400 (Bad Request) error page. Short, calm.

description.description: One-line, light-hearted explanation under the 400 error heading. The request was malformed.

title.description: Heading on the 403 (Access Denied) error page. Short, calm.

description.description: One-line, light-hearted explanation under the 403 error heading. The user is not authorized; signing in may help.

title.description: Heading on the 404 (Not Found) error page. Short, calm.

description.description: One-line, light-hearted explanation under the 404 error heading. The page does not exist.

title.description: Heading on the 500 (Server Error) error page. Short, calm.

description.description: One-line, light-hearted explanation under the 500 error heading. Something failed on our side; retrying may help.

goHome.description: Button that navigates back to the site home page.

searchDomains.description: Button on the 404 page that jumps to domain search.

logIn.description: Button to sign in, shown on auth-related error pages. Same intent as Sign In.

signIn.description: Sign-in button on the unauthorized-access card.

goToHome.description: Button on the unauthorized-access card that returns to the home page.

title.description: Heading of the unauthorized-access card shown when a user lacks permission for a page.

description.description: Body of the unauthorized-access card explaining the user lacks permission and can sign in or go home.

contactSupport.description: Footnote on the unauthorized-access card inviting the user to contact support if they think it's a mistake.

reference.description: Small footnote showing the support reference id. Keep the {requestId} placeholder verbatim; translate only the label word before it.

failedTitle.description: Toast title shown when starting the sign-in flow fails.

failedDescription.description: Toast body shown when starting the sign-in flow fails; asks the user to try again.
